Label: Vero Assess Pricing Tier
Description: The pricing plan selected by the customer

Label: Vero Assess Payment Frequency
Description: How often the customer is billed

Label: Vero Assess Payment Method
Description: How the customer chose to pay

Label: Vero Assess Order Value
Description: Total order value in GBP

Label: Vero Assess Number of Roles
Description: Total number of assessment roles selected

Label: Vero Assess Roles (Order)
Description: Full list of selected roles — one per line. Exact names from the website.
Example Value:
Administrative Assistant
Office Coordinator
Document Controller

Label: Vero Assess Auto-Renewal (Annual)
Description: Whether the annual licence should auto-renew in 12 months. Only set for annual subscription tiers.

Label: Vero Assess Buyer First Name
Description: First name of the person who completed checkout

Label: Vero Assess Buyer Last Name
Description: Last name of the person who completed checkout

Label: Vero Assess Buyer Email
Description: Email address of the person who completed checkout

Label: Vero Assess Buyer Job Title
Description: Job title of the person who completed checkout

Label: Vero Assess Buyer Phone
Description: Phone number of the person who completed checkout

Label: Vero Assess Key Contact Name
Description: Full name of the key project contact. Same as buyer if 'same as me' was ticked.

Label: Vero Assess Key Contact Email
Description: Email of the key project contact. Same as buyer if 'same as me' was ticked.

Label: Vero Assess URL
Description: Custom portal subdomain chosen by the customer. Not available for Starter tier.

Label: Vero Assess Users
Description: Numbered list of email addresses for users who need system access. One per line, numbered.

Label: Vero Assess Candidate Feedback Reports
Description: Whether the company wants to send candidate feedback reports to candidates.

Label: Vero Assess Brand Colour 1
Description: Primary brand hex colour for portal branding. Not available for Starter tier.

Label: Vero Assess Brand Colour 2
Description: Secondary brand hex colour for portal branding. Not available for Starter tier.

Label: Vero Assess Company Logo
Description: Public URL to the uploaded company logo file hosted in HubSpot File Manager. Clickable link to view/download.

Label: Vero Assess Campaign Dates
Description: Readable list of per-role campaign open/close dates. One role per line, formatted as "Role Name: DD/MM/YYYY – DD/MM/YYYY".

Label: Vero Assess Earliest Campaign Open Date
Description: The earliest campaign open date across all selected roles. Useful for HubSpot filters and workflows.

Label: Vero Assess Latest Campaign Close Date
Description: The latest campaign close date across all selected roles. Useful for HubSpot filters and workflows.

Label: Vero Assess Contract Accepted
Description: Whether the customer accepted the service agreement before payment.

Label: Vero Assess Contract Accepted Date
Description: The date the customer accepted the service agreement.

Label: Vero Assess Approx. Roles (Bespoke)
Description: Approximate number of roles the customer needs. Selected from a dropdown on the bespoke enquiry form.

Label: Vero Assess Approx. Candidates/Year (Bespoke)
Description: Approximate number of candidates per year. Selected from a dropdown on the bespoke enquiry form.

Label: Vero Assess Target Go-Live Date (Bespoke)
Description: The customer's target go-live date for their assessment portal.

Label: Vero Assess Specific Requirements (Bespoke)
Description: Free-text field where the customer describes any specific requirements for their bespoke plan.
Example Value: We need multi-language support and custom reporting.

Label: Vero Assess Roles
Description: Original checkbox property created by client. Not populated by checkout code due to role name mismatches between the website (Sanity CMS) and HubSpot checkbox options. Roles are captured in vero_assess_roles_order instead.

Label: Key Contract Contact
Description: Original property created by client. Not found in HubSpot export. Key contact data is captured in vero_assess_key_contact_name and vero_assess_key_contact_email instead.
